2605.00351.title: Hypergraph and Latent ODE Learning for Multimodal Root Cause Localization in Microservices
2605.00351.paper_summary: Root cause localization in cloud native microservice systems requires modeling complex service dependencies, irregular temporal dynamics, and heterogeneous observability data. We present HyperODE RCA, a unified framework that combines hypergraph attention learning, latent ordinary differential equations, and multimodal cross attention fusion for fine grained root cause analysis. The method learns higher order service interactions through differentiable hyperedge construction, captures continuous anomaly evolution from irregular observations with an ODE RNN encoder, and adaptively fuses logs, traces, metrics, entities, and events using context aware modality routing. We further improve robustness with a variational information bottleneck, temporal causal regularization, and invariant risk constraints. Experiments on the Tianchi AIOps benchmark show clear gains over strong baselines in ranking and classification performance, while preserving interpretability through learned hypergraph attention.
2605.00351.paper_summary_zh: 根本原因定位在雲原生微服務系統中需要建模複雜的服務依賴關係、不規則的時間動態和異質的可觀察數據。<lb/>我們提出了 HyperODE RCA，一個統一的框架，結合了超圖注意力學習、潛在常微分方程和多模態交叉注意力融合，以進行細粒度的根本原因分析。<lb/>該方法通過可微分的超邊構建學習高階服務交互，利用 ODE RNN 編碼器從不規則觀察中捕捉連續的異常演變，並使用上下文感知的模態路由自適應融合日誌、追蹤、指標、實體和事件。<lb/>我們進一步通過變分信息瓶頸、時間因果正則化和不變風險約束來提高穩健性。<lb/>在 Tianchi AIOps 基準上的實驗顯示，在排名和分類性能上相較於強基線有明顯的提升，同時通過學習的超圖注意力保持了解釋性。
2605.00351.author: Xin Liu et.al.
2605.00351.authors: Xin Liu, Yuhang He, Sichen Zhao, Kejian Tong, Xingyu Zhang
